news.title: Finance Ministry releases monthly GST collection figures
news.summary: Monthly Goods and Services Tax collections were reported, reflecting economic activity and compliance trends.
news.examPoint: GST structure and collection trends are common in Economy GA.

news.title: Cabinet approves new scheme to boost rural infrastructure
news.summary: The Union Cabinet approved a scheme aimed at strengthening rural roads and connectivity, targeting completion within a defined timeline to improve last-mile access.
news.examPoint: Remember the implementing ministry and the financial outlay for objective questions.

news.title: India and partner country sign MoU on renewable energy cooperation
news.summary: A Memorandum of Understanding was signed to enhance collaboration in solar and green hydrogen technologies, supporting India's clean-energy targets.
news.examPoint: Note the countries involved and the sector (renewable energy) for GA questions.

news.title: Reserve Bank of India keeps policy repo rate unchanged
news.summary: The Monetary Policy Committee decided to maintain the repo rate, citing inflation management and growth considerations.
news.examPoint: Key terms: Repo Rate, MPC, CRR, SLR — frequently asked in Economy GA.

news.title: Government launches digital portal for citizen grievances
news.summary: A unified digital platform was launched to streamline citizen grievance redressal across departments with time-bound resolution.
news.examPoint: Link to Digital India initiative; remember the launching ministry.

news.title: ISRO announces successful satellite launch
news.summary: The space agency successfully placed a communication/earth-observation satellite into orbit, strengthening India's space capabilities.
news.examPoint: Note the launch vehicle (PSLV/GSLV) and satellite name.

news.title: National award conferred for excellence in public administration
news.summary: Civil servants and districts were recognised for innovative governance and effective implementation of flagship programmes.
news.examPoint: Awards & honours are a recurring GA sub-topic.

news.title: Health Ministry rolls out nationwide vaccination drive update
news.summary: An update on the national immunisation programme highlighted coverage milestones and new additions to the vaccine schedule.
news.examPoint: Remember programme names like Mission Indradhanush.

vocab.sentence: The teacher gave a lucid explanation of the topic.
The benevolent donor funded the new school.

vocab.meaning: Tending to keep a firm hold; persistent
vocab.sentence: Her tenacious effort finally paid off.

vocab.meaning: Open to more than one interpretation
vocab.sentence: The instructions were ambiguous and confusing.

vocab.meaning: Acting with care and thought for the future
vocab.sentence: It is prudent to keep an emergency fund.

vocab.meaning: Able to adapt to many functions or activities
vocab.sentence: He is a versatile player who can bat and bowl.

vocab.meaning: Examine or inspect closely and thoroughly
vocab.sentence: Auditors scrutinize every entry in the ledger.

vocab.meaning: Make less severe, serious, or painful
vocab.sentence: Planting trees can mitigate the effects of pollution.

vocab.meaning: Make suffering or a problem less severe
vocab.sentence: The new policy aims to alleviate poverty.

vocab.meaning: Declare one's public approval or support
vocab.sentence: The committee endorsed the proposal unanimously.
